column1: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Please fix this immediately.
The application keeps crashing every time I try to export my report to PDF.
Do you offer any enterprise discounts for teams of 50 or more people?
I forgot to cancel my free trial and got billed. Can I please get my money back?
How do I update the credit card on file for my upcoming renewal?
I'm interested in the premium tier, can we schedule a demo to see the new features?
Error 502 Bad Gateway appears every time I click the dashboard link. Is the server down?
I am not satisfied with the product and would like to request a full refund.
Can someone please call me? I have a general question about my account.
